# Carnosine Performance

> Australian distributor and promoter of LactiGo — the world's only topical carnosine performance and recovery gel.

## About

Carnosine Performance (carnosine.com.au) is the Australian home of LactiGo, a topical gel built around carnosine (the beta-alanine + histidine dipeptide). LactiGo is designed to support muscle performance and recovery, applied topically approximately 30–45 minutes before activity and again after exercise.

**Key facts:**
- Used by 16,500+ elite athletes including professionals from the NHL, NFL, NBA, MLB, NCAA Division I, and European football
- Informed Sport certified — tested for prohibited substances
- US patent held by pharmaceutical parent company Ethoderm
- Backed by a 2025 peer-reviewed study on world-class rugby sevens players
- ANZCTR registered trial on file
- 2018 study: enhanced transepidermal penetration from carnosine + magnesium gel (3D human skin model)

## Why Topical?

Oral carnosine has bioavailability limitations — it is rapidly broken down in the gut. Topical delivery is designed to work around this challenge by delivering carnosine through the skin directly to muscle tissue.

## Business Model

Carnosine Performance operates a direct sales and affiliate model. Customers can upgrade to affiliates and build customer bases, earning commissions and bonuses.
